_readme: SoundForge manifest — THE customization surface. Each entry is one game sound (id must match ProtoAudio's stream id). To customize a sound: edit its prompt here, then run `node tools/soundforge/generate.mjs <id> --force` and re-import. The game loads game/assets/sfx/<id>.mp3 when it exists, else falls back to the synthesized version. Full workflow: tools/soundforge/README.md

sounds.prompt: Single 9mm pistol gunshot, dry and sharp, close range, post-apocalyptic wasteland ambience, short tail, no reverb wash
Single pump-action shotgun blast, heavy and punchy, close range, gritty, short mechanical pump chk-chk at the end
Car explosion, deep boom with metal debris scattering on asphalt, distant echo across empty highway
Gun magazine reload click, crisp single mechanical snap, dry, close
Single sharp dog bark, medium-large dog, alert warning bark, outdoors
Low menacing dog growl, guttural, sustained, close, threatening
Male grunt of pain, short sharp exhale, getting hit, gritty realistic
Small retro UI blip, single short soft electronic tick, subtle, interface confirm
Old wooden door creaking open slowly, rusty hinges, abandoned house
Fast melee weapon swing whoosh, heavy metal wrench cutting air, single swipe, short
Heavy blunt impact on flesh and bone, dull meaty thunk, single hit, visceral, short
Tiny dry hit-marker tick, very short subtle click confirm, videogame hit feedback, quiet
Old car horn honk, two quick blasts, slightly detuned rusty vehicle, outdoors
Distant wolf-like creature howl at night, eerie rising and falling, echoing across empty wasteland, ominous, slightly wrong and mutated
Old V8 car engine idling steadily, seamless loop, constant rpm, throaty rumble, no fade in or out, mechanical, worn muscle car
Vehicle fire burning steadily, crackling flames with occasional pops, seamless loop, no fade in or out
Single sharp human finger whistle, one quick piercing rising chirp, commanding a dog, dry outdoor air, short, no reverb
Two-tone human come-here whistle, low note then high note, wheet-wheeoo, calling a dog over, outdoors, dry, no reverb
Long sustained human attention whistle, single loud piercing note held steady then falling off at the end, finger whistle, outdoors, dry
Single soft boot footstep on packed dirt, dull crunch, no reverb, dry, quiet, foley
Single boot footstep on asphalt road, hard flat scuff, no reverb, dry, foley

Single boot footstep on old wooden floorboard, hollow knock with a faint creak, interior, dry, no reverb, foley
Desert wind ambience, dry steady wind blowing over open sand and sparse scrub, constant airy texture, no gusts or swells, seamless loop, no fade in or out, no music
Open grassland plains ambience, light steady breeze through tall dry grass with sparse daytime insects chirping evenly, seamless loop, no fade in or out, no music
Forest ambience, gentle steady wind through leaves with occasional distant songbirds, even texture, seamless loop, no fade in or out, no music
Distant small town murmur, faint indistinct human voices and occasional far-off metal clank, heard from far away, muffled and low, steady even texture, seamless loop, no fade in or out, no music
Night ambience, steady crickets chirping evenly with a faint cool breeze, calm, constant texture, seamless loop, no fade in or out, no music
Exhausted male breathing hard while running, steady rhythmic panting, even pace, no words, seamless loop, no fade in or out
Old car door slamming shut, single heavy metallic clunk with a rattle, rusty worn vehicle, outdoors, dry, short
Car tires screeching in a hard skid on asphalt, single short rubber squeal, dry, no music
Sad dog whine, single short high-pitched whimper, medium-large dog, close, quiet
Human body diving and rolling once on dirt ground, cloth rustle and a dull ground thud, single tumble, dry, no reverb, foley
